Contract created at `.fabro-work/contract.md`. Summary:

## Status
- **fabro-db**: 5/5 passing ✓
- **fabro-mcp**: 17/17 passing ✓  
- **fabro-github**: 40/40 passing ✓
- **fabro-cli -- synth**: 10/13 passing (3 failing)
- **fabro-synthesis -- render**: 59/62 passing (3 failing)

## Total Failing Tests (6)
1. `synth_evolve_preview_stays_bounded_to_manifest_and_report`
2. `synth_evolve_updates_existing_package`
3. `synth_evolve_can_import_current_package_without_blueprint_flag`
4. `inject_workspace_verify_lanes_adds_parent_holistic_gauntlet`
5. `inject_workspace_verify_lanes_document_release_is_hard_gate_and_retro_is_tail`
6. `inject_workspace_verify_lanes_adds_conditional_parent_lanes_for_sensitive_plan`

## Deliverables
- `.fabro-work/implementation.md` — Root cause analysis and fix plan
- `.fabro-work/verification.md` — Test execution results
- `.fabro-work/quality.md` — Test quality assessment
- `.fabro-work/promotion.md` — CI integration notes
- `.fabro-work/integration.md` — Cross-crate integration verification

- `cargo nextest run -p fabro-mcp && cargo nextest run -p fabro-github`
- `cargo nextest run -p fabro-synthesis -- render`

Required durable artifacts:
- `implementation.md`
- `verification.md`
- `quality.md`
- `promotion.md`
- `integration.md`
